 Systems Design
Show all⁠
AI Systems DeveloperMelbourne CBD | Hybrid (4 days office / 1 day WFH)
Salary: Competitive package
Build and operate the AI systems shaping the future of fintech.

We’re partnering with an innovative Melbourne-based fintech that is transforming how businesses manage invoice payments and cash flow.

As they continue building an AI-native platform, they are looking for an AI Systems Developer to help take their AI capabilities from early development through to reliable, production-ready systems.
This is a unique opportunity for an engineer who enjoys the intersection of software engineering, artificial intelligence and platform reliability — someone who doesn’t just want to experiment with AI, but wants to build, deploy and own systems that create real business impact.

The Role: As an AI Systems Developer, you will be responsible for building and operating the production AI stack.

You’ll work across:
LLM-powered applications
AI agents and automation workflows
Data pipelines and retrieval systems
Model serving and AI infrastructure
Monitoring, observability and performance optimisation
Once AI capabilities are live, you’ll own their reliability — ensuring systems remain scalable, secure, cost-effective and performant.

This role sits within the Data, AI & Systems function and will work closely with engineering and product teams to safely embed AI into critical business processes.

What You’ll Be Doing:

Build AI capabilities into production
Design, develop and deploy AI-powered features and services
Build data pipelines, retrieval systems and AI agents
Work with LLM applications and model-serving infrastructure
Improve engineering practices to safely integrate AI into the core platform
Own reliability and performance
Monitor AI systems across uptime, latency, cost and accuracy
Build observability across metrics, logs, tracing and evaluations
Identify performance issues, model degradation and system failures
Optimise AI systems for scale and efficiency
Support production operations
Participate in incident response and troubleshooting
Develop runbooks, processes and safeguards
Implement safe deployment, rollback and change-management practices
Improve systems to prevent recurring issues
About You

You’re a strong software engineer who enjoys owning systems beyond just writing code.
You’ll ideally have:
5+ years of software engineering experience
Experience operating production systems at scale
Hands-on experience with AI/LLM applications, agents or ML systems
Strong AWS experience
Infrastructure-as-Code experience (Terraform preferred)
Experience building data pipelines and working with databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
Experience with monitoring, observability and incident response
Strong understanding of reliability, scalability and system design
Experience with the following would be advantageous:
Ruby on Rails
Domain Driven Design
Financial services or other high-reliability industries
Kubernetes / cloud-native architectures
Why Join? This is an opportunity to be part of one of Australia’s most exciting AI-driven fintech journeys.
You’ll have the chance to:
Build AI systems from the ground up
Own technology that directly impacts customers and business outcomes
Work with modern AI tooling and infrastructure
Shape how AI is implemented safely in a financial platform
Join a collaborative, high-performing engineering team
Additional benefits include:
Competitive salary and benefits package
Hybrid working model (Monday–Thursday in the Melbourne CBD office, Friday WFH)
Modern office environment
Regular team events and interstate off-sites
Clear opportunities for growth and progression
Employer questions
Your application will include the following questions:
Which of the following statements best describes your right to work in Australia?
How many years' experience do you have as a Systems Developer?

rendered_markdown:
# David Cropper

**Target role:** AI Engineer

> Owner review required before any external use.

## Summary

AI Engineer with commercial technology experience since 2009 spanning software quality assurance, test automation, and Data Engineering, including 3.5 years of commercial enterprise Data Engineering experience, plus independent AI Engineering and portfolio development producing production-oriented AI systems spanning retrieval-augmented generation, operational intelligence, explainable AI, and enterprise decision support.

## Summary themes (from Tailoring Plan)

- AWS
- LLM application development
- Operational intelligence

_Summary rewrite fell back to the career-profile summary; themes are retained for owner review._

## Skills

### Emphasised

- AWS (technical)
- LLM application development (domain)

### Additional

- Python (technical)
- FastAPI (technical)
- Docker (technical)
- OpenAI APIs (technical)
- PyTest (technical)
- Git (technical)
- SQL (technical)
- S3 (technical)
- Athena (technical)
- Glue (technical)
- Cloudwatch (technical)
- DynamoDB (technical)
- Apache NiFi (technical)
- LangChain (technical)
- ChromaDB (technical)
- Pandas (technical)
- OpenPyXL (technical)
- REST APIs (technical)
- Microsoft Fabric (technical)
- Databricks (technical)
- Snowflake (technical)
- dbt (technical)
- Azure Data Factory (technical)
- Selenium WebDriver (technical)
- Jenkins (technical)
- Maven (technical)
- Cucumber (technical)
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (domain)
- Operational intelligence (domain)
- Explainable AI (domain)
- Enterprise decision support (domain)
- Data engineering (domain)
- Geospatial processing (domain)
- Software quality assurance (domain)
- Test automation (domain)
- Architecture-first design (soft)
- Agile collaboration (soft)

## Projects

### Operational Intelligence Copilot

Domain-agnostic operational intelligence platform combining deterministic analytics with Large Language Model reasoning to analyse structured business data and generate explainable, evidence-backed executive insights.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, OpenAI APIs, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Produces evidence-backed executive reporting.
- Maintains decision traceability through explainable recommendations.

**Demonstrates:**

- Intelligent intent routing
- Dataset profiling
- Anomaly detection
- Regression-tested analytics workflows
- Explainable AI recommendations

### Governance-Aware Document Intelligence RAG

Enterprise retrieval-augmented generation platform supporting trustworthy AI responses over organisational knowledge.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, Docker, LangChain, ChromaDB, OpenAI, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Supports grounded responses over multi-format organisational documents.
- Provides evaluation, telemetry, and explainability controls.

**Demonstrates:**

- Multi-format document ingestion
- Embedding generation
- Retrieval orchestration
- Evaluation frameworks
- Grounding validation

### Payroll Diagnostics Engine

Rule-based operational decision-support platform that identifies payroll anomalies through deterministic business-rule evaluation.

**Technologies:** Python, Pandas, OpenPyXL, PyTest, Git

**Outcomes:**

- Produces explainable operational findings.
- Generates executive-ready reporting.

**Demonstrates:**

- Rule engines
- Explainable diagnostics
- Operational analytics
- Automated validation

## Experience

### AI Engineer - Independent Research & Development — Chase Risk & Compliance

*2025-12 – Present* · `independent_engineering`

Melbourne, VIC

- Independently develops progressively more complex production-oriented AI Engineering projects under a dedicated portfolio brand.
- Builds engineering capability across retrieval-augmented generation, operational intelligence, explainable AI, and enterprise decision-support project areas.
- Applies architecture-first engineering practices using Cursor, Git, and PyTest across the complete development lifecycle.

**Technologies:** Python, FastAPI, Docker, OpenAI APIs, Cursor, Git, PyTest

### AI Engineering Professional Development and Portfolio Development — Independent study

*2025-07 – 2025-11* · `professional_development`

Melbourne, VIC

- Made a deliberate pivot from Data Engineering to AI Engineering as the primary career focus.
- Undertook structured AI Engineering study.
- Developed progressively more sophisticated portfolio projects.
- Adopted increasingly production-oriented engineering practices, including testing, documentation, and milestone-driven development.

**Technologies:** Python, OpenAI APIs, LangChain, Git, PyTest

### Data Engineering Professional Development and Career Transition — Independent study

*2023-10 – 2025-06* · `professional_development`

Melbourne, VIC

- Began with a personal break following the nbn Australia role.
- Undertook structured upskilling in modern Data Engineering.
- Developed skills across contemporary data platforms and tools, including Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, Snowflake, dbt, and Azure Data Factory.
- Prepared for a return to Data Engineering work.

**Technologies:** Microsoft Fabric, Databricks, Snowflake, dbt, Azure Data Factory

### Data Engineer — nbn Australia

*2020-03 – 2023-10* · `employment`

- Developed and maintained enterprise data pipelines using AWS services, Python, SQL and Apache NiFi.
- Performed SQL transformations and data validation.
- Worked in Agile teams supporting production systems.

**Technologies:** Python, SQL, AWS, S3, Athena, Glue, Cloudwatch, DynamoDB, Apache NiFi, Git, PyTest

## Certifications (profile baseline — not tailored)

- AWS Certified Developer - Associate (Amazon Web Services) — active
- Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional (Databricks) — active

---

_Experience guidance: `master_cv_only`. This draft must not be submitted without owner review._
